content:
Congratulations to Drive Auto Repair for beating Motiv8 16-5. Real impressive, boys. You beat a team whose name is literally a motivational poster at a dentist's office. Pop the champagne. Call ESPN. Alert the media. A bunch of grown men with knee braces scored 16 runs against what appeared to be a team that carpooled from a fantasy football draft.

Coach Ranney drew up the game plan on a napkin at Waffle House and somehow it worked. The offense came out swinging like they all had outstanding warrants. The defense? Let's just say the errors weren't tracked because nobody wanted to do that much math.

Meanwhile, half the lineup can't touch their toes but swears they're "warming up" every Monday at 7:55 PM. The dugout smells like Bengay and bad decisions. One of you brought a lawn chair. You know who you are.

Rocket Power dropped 34 on the Dirt Dawgs, so let's not get too comfortable. Drive's 16 runs look cute next to that. That's like bragging about your Honda Civic at a Ferrari dealership — which, given the team name, is painfully on brand.

Next week: Flamingos. If you lose to a team called the Flamingos, every single one of you owes the group chat a pink jersey selfie. No exceptions. See you Monday. ⚾
